params.name: Annunciation
params.description:
On Dec 13, 1472 AD, Da Vinci completed the Annunciation.
The Annunciation is an oil painting on wood painted by Da Vinci, depicting the Archangel Gabriel, sent by God, to announce to Mary that she will become pregnant with the Son of God. This broad-width composition shows a beautiful courtyard landscape. Da Vinci used a perspective that focuses on Mary and carefully considered the folds of the clothes, and buildings in the courtyard. These details portray the beauty of natural scenery, as we …
